TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jabari_Brown, title = Jabari_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jabari_Brown} }

S.FORM: Jabari Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 12, Jabari Brown, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jabari Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 12, Jabari Brown, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *aő≤ari ő≤rown ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēaras~…ē mari Ē taj s~…ēuruw / p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *aő≤ari ő≤rown, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
